name: bookends-research-skill
description: Bookends Research Skill — a deep-linked, highlighted research report on any topic. Creates a Bookends group with topic-appropriate subtopic child groups, finds authoritative sources (guidelines, systematic reviews, key studies), attaches full-text PDFs to Bookends references, writes one persistent highlight and a page-accurate bookends:// deep link per source, and assembles ONE combined styled HTML report (executive summary; per-article cards with inline highlighted, deep-linked quotes; stance/source-type table; navigable narrative synthesis; Word-ready Academic Summary; References in Vancouver style). Saved into Bookends (Reports subgroup) and to disk.
